title: Chapter Stamp Navigation
prompt:
Create a production-ready Chapter Stamp Navigation using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Make a compact three-chapter navigator where the active chapter receives a small indigo editorial stamp at its leading edge. Changing chapters shifts the stamp, updates a clear one-sentence panel, and keeps the navigation calm rather than app-like. Use a light Bento setting: #F4F5F6 surround, white card, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F secondary copy. Indigo is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or make the active chapter recognizable only by color.

Implement the WAI-ARIA tabs pattern with a tablist, tabs, selected state, and a labelled tabpanel. Arrow Left and Arrow Right move focus and selection; Home and End move to the first and last tab. Click and Enter or Space must select a tab. Use 44px tab targets and a visible 3px dark focus ring. Hover can lift a tab 2px over 180ms; press can compress it 1px over 90ms. Move the stamp with a stiffness 360, damping 29 spring, and fade panel copy over 170ms. Use local state only, without timers, random values, storage, remote assets, or network calls.

At 320px allow labels to wrap without overflowing and keep the tabpanel readable. In larger previews retain this compact chapter strip. Maintain AA contrast and logical focus order. Prefer transform and opacity, and respect prefers-reduced-motion by switching immediately or fading over 120ms. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
BriefEvidence
*/ .uiwiki-chapters{display:flex;gap:4px;border-bottom:1px solid #ececee}.uiwiki-chapters a{min-height:44px;padding:0 10px;color:#111;font:800 14px system-ui;text-decoration:none}.uiwiki-chapters a[aria-current="page"]{border-bottom:4px solid #4f46e5}.uiwiki-chapters a:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-chapters *{transition:none}}
